name: CONGENITAL INSENSITIVITY TO PAIN WITH ANHYDROSIS
definition: rare autosomal recessive disorder presumably on the basis of abnormal neural crest

demographics.Path: absence of dorsal + sympathetic ganglia, deficiency of neural fibers < 6 µm in diameter

dominant_finding: epiphyseal separation in infancy → epiphyseal injuries → growth problems
distribution: epiphyseal separation in infancy → epiphyseal injuries → growth problems
discriminating_features: epiphyseal separation in infancy → epiphyseal injuries → growth problems
Charcot joints = neurotrophic joints (usually weight-bearing joints) with effusions + synovial

general: epiphyseal separation in infancy → epiphyseal injuries → growth problems
Charcot joints = neurotrophic joints (usually weight-bearing joints) with effusions + synovial
bizarre deformities + gross displacement + considerable hemorrhage ← unnoticed fractures +
± osteomyelitis + septic arthritis → may progress extensively
